84:
WITH all_adm AS (
  SELECT AdmFName1 AS fname, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
),
name_counts AS (
  SELECT fname, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM all_adm
  GROUP BY fname
  ORDER BY cnt DESC
  LIMIT 2
)
SELECT a.fname AS first_name, a.District
FROM all_adm a
JOIN name_counts nc ON a.fname = nc.fname
ORDER BY nc.cnt DESC, a.fname;	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT 
    CAST(cnt_bad AS REAL) * 100.0 / total_cnt AS percentage_bad,
    marvel_bad_cnt
FROM (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_cnt,
        SUM(CASE WHEN al.alignment IN ('Bad','Neutral') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt_bad,
        SUM(CASE WHEN al.alignment IN ('Bad','Neutral') AND pu.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_bad_cnt
    FROM superhero s
    JOIN alignment al ON s.alignment_id = al.id
    JOIN publisher pu ON s.publisher_id = pu.id
);	----- bird -----	superhero
744:
SELECT
   CASE WHEN marvel_cnt > dc_cnt THEN 'Marvel Comics' ELSE 'DC Comics' END AS larger_publisher,
   (marvel_cnt - dc_cnt) AS difference
FROM (
   SELECT
      SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_cnt,
      SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dc_cnt
   FROM superhero s
   JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
   WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
) t;	----- bird -----	superhero

             FROM customers c

             WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'

         AND t.Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT SUM(t.total_consumption)/COUNT(*)

             FROM customers c
             JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
             WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
             GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment) t
       WHERE t.total_consumption = (SELECT MIN(total_consumption) 
                                    FROM (SELECT SUM(ym2.Consumption) AS total_consumption
                                          FROM customers c3
                                          JOIN yearmonth ym2 ON c3.CustomerID = ym2.CustomerID
                                          WHERE c3.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
                                          GROUP BY c3.CustomerID)) 
         AND t.Segment = 'LAM') 
   - (SELECT SUM(t.total_consumption)/COUNT(*) 
       FROM (SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
             FROM customers c
             JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
             WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
             GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment) t
       WHERE t.total_consumption = (SELECT MIN(total_consumption) 
                                    FROM (SELECT SUM(ym2.Consumption) AS total_consumption
                                          FROM customers c3
                                          JOIN yearmonth ym2 ON c3.CustomerID = ym2.CustomerID
                                          WHERE c3.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
                                          GROUP BY c3.CustomerID)) 
         AND t.Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT SUM(t.total_consumption)/COUNT(*) 
       FROM (SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
             FROM customers c
             JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
             WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
             GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment) t
       WHERE t.total_consumption = (SELECT MIN(total_consumption) 
                                    FROM (SELECT SUM(ym2.Consumption) AS total_consumption
                                          FROM customers c3
                                          JOIN yearmonth ym2 ON c3.CustomerID = ym2.CustomerID
                                          WHERE c3.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
                                          GROUP BY c3.CustomerID)) 
         AND t.Segment = 'KAM') 
   - (SELECT SUM(t.total_consumption)/COUNT(*) 
       FROM (SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
             FROM customers c
             JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
             WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'

       WHERE t.total_consumption = (SELECT MIN(total_consumption)

                                          FROM customers c3

                                          WHERE c3.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'

;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
WITH seg_cons AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END) AS cons_2012,
         SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) AS cons_2013
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    AND (substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' OR substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT Segment FROM (
  SELECT Segment, (cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2012 * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM seg_cons
  ORDER BY pct_inc DESC
  LIMIT 1
) UNION ALL
SELECT Segment FROM (
  SELECT Segment, (cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2012 * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM seg_cons
  ORDER BY pct_inc ASC
  LIMIT 1
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT y.CustomerID, y.Consumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN transactions_1k t ON y.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5
  AND (t.Price / t.Amount) > 29.0
  AND y.Date = '201208';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
